cards.back: The unfair or discriminatory treatment of individuals or groups in AI systems, resulting in unequal outcomes
The use of personal data for purposes other than those for which it was collected, often without the consent of the data subject
The reduction in the number of jobs available due to automation and AI, potentially leading to unemployment and economic disruption
The failure of AI systems to provide clear explanations for their decisions or actions, making it difficult to trust or hold them accountable
The use of AI systems that are not based on adequate data, research, or expertise, leading to poor or uninformed decisions
